Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town, bringing the total number of dogs to 29. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog, increasing the total to 30. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, reducing the total to 24. The number of dogs in the rescue center is [current_dogs], and the number of dogs received on Thursday is [thursday_puppies]. The number of dogs adopted on Saturday is [saturday_adoptions]. The total number of dogs in the rescue center is [total_dogs].
